title: [FMCS-L] fps X media X crystal x survival Optimized LITE
description: A lightweight optimization modpack designed to boost FPS and improve performance.
body:
# 🟩 FMCS‑L — Lite Edition
## fps × media × crystal × survival

## 📘 Overview
FMCS‑L is the ultra‑lightweight, high‑performance edition of the FMCS series, built specifically for low‑end hardware and older laptops.  
It focuses purely on maximizing FPS, stability, and responsiveness — especially in Crystal PvP and crowded servers.

> [!TIP]
> Perfect for Intel UHD, MX‑series GPUs, and weak CPUs.

---

## 🎯 Purpose
- Achieve the highest FPS possible on weak systems  
- Minimize GPU and CPU load  
- Eliminate micro‑stutters in combat  
- Provide a clean and distraction‑free experience  
- Ideal for competitive PvP and low‑end survival gameplay

---

## ✨ Features
- Full performance tuning across rendering, world ticking, entity load, and game scheduling  
- Reduced visual load for maximum smoothness  
- Lightweight skin handling  
- Aggressive culling and frame‑time stabilization  
- Optimized internal configurations for speed  
- Zero unnecessary visuals or cosmetic systems  
- Ultra‑low latency input profile


---

## 🧪 Expected Performance
- 4x FPS  
- 4x optimize
- 4x smooth
- 2x options

---

## 🔗 Other Editions  
- [FMCS‑M (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-m)
- [FMCS‑H (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)
- [FMCS‑S (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)

> [!NOTE]
> For weak GPUs → [FMCS‑L](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
> 
> For mid GPUs → [FMCS‑M](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-m) 
> 
> For nicer visuals → [FMCS‑H](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)
> 
> For servers → [FMCS‑S](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)
